11 November, 2022

* Tweet

The UK IT sector is projected to undergo several recruitment challenges in the coming years. The skills gap is increasing as many sectors fail to attract and retain the talent needed to meet future demand. It is exacerbated by the fact that Brexit would almost certainly result in a shortage of EU employees in the UK.

Skills shortage is a global problem, but it is particularly acute in the UK. It is because the UK has a relatively small pool of talent to draw from. However, recruiting new employees can be expensive and time-consuming. Thus, you can use recruitment agencies to streamline the hiring process and find the best-suited candidates.

To meet these challenges, organizations must start re-considering their recruitment strategies. They need to look at ways to attract the best talent. Hence, we have prepared a list of the 30 best tech recruitment agencies in London that can help you find the right candidate in no time.

## Online Assessment Platform for Streamlining Skill-based Applicant Selection with Recruitment Agencies

1\. iMocha

iMocha-New-homepageG2 rating: 4.4/5 (262 reviews)

**Founded In:** 2015

Undoubtedly tech recruitment agencies can help you streamline your hiring process. However, you can further reduce your hiring efforts and acquire the most qualified candidates by leveraging skills assessment platforms like iMocha.

iMocha is a platform that offers various talent acquisition solutions, such as detailed skills analytics,the world's largest skills assessment library, job-based assessments, and more to help talent professionals make intelligent hiring decisions.

It offers intelligent solutions like AI-LogicBox, a platform that allows candidates to 'code in the blanks' to save time and effort (rather than coding from scratch); AI-EnglishPro, which assesses candidates' speaking, writing, reading, and listening and benchmarks according to CEFR level, and more.

**Perks**

* It offers advanced proctoring features to eliminate cheating.
* It features an automated video interview tool.
* It includes a comprehensive skill library covering 3000+ skills.
* It also offers industry benchmarking to help determine better results.

In 2023, iMocha unveiled its Skills Intelligence Cloud, an advanced platform for talent acquisition and management. This AI-enabled solution assesses employee skills accurately, enabling organizations to optimize workforce planning and talent development initiatives.

The Skills Intelligence Cloud facilitates in-depth skill gap analyses, personalizes learning paths, and enhances team dynamics for improved productivity. 

**Free trial:** Available

## Conclusion

Overall, these are a few of the best tech recruitment agencies in London that can help you find the right candidate for your organization. Do your research and find an agency that best suits your needs and preferences. With the help of a good recruitment agency, you will be able to identify the top talent and place them in the right roles.

## FAQs

**How do tech recruitment agencies work?**

Tech recruitment agencies work by connecting employers with job seekers in the technology industry. They typically have a database of candidates and use various tools to match them with open positions. The recruitment agency may also guide the company on compensation, benefits, and other negotiation points. 

**Why is tech recruitment a difficult task?**

There are several reasons why tech recruitment is a difficult task. A few of the major ones are:

* **Shortage of qualified candidates:** With the ever-increasing demand for tech employees, there aren't enough qualified candidates to fill all open positions.
* **Tech workers are often in high demand:** This means that companies have to compete against each other for the same candidates, driving up salaries and making it difficult to attract and retain top talent.
* **The fast-paced nature of the tech industry means that positions can become obsolete quickly:** This can make it hard to stay up with the latest trends and technology and can lead to quickly outdated job descriptions and requirements.

**Which is the best tech recruitment agency in London?**

There is no one-size-fits-all answer to this question, as the best tech recruitment agency in London will vary depending on your specific needs and preferences. You can, however, use some of the best tech recruiting companies in London highlighted in this article to make an educated decision.
